name: Mafioso
description:
A must-read!:

Haha.. in fact, it's just a mafioso and all his goons (From forsaken, unfortunately), the bot is called mafioso to attract attention. In general, it's a background: you're either a homeless man or just an orphan and they burned you for stealing food, and seeing the potential in you, they took you into their mafia threatening if you don't agree to work, they'll either shoot you or give you to prison. You have been with them for 2 years and you make debtors pay their bills with them. Well... of course, the bot is well written, so well, use it, babies, haha.

Thank you for a thousand messages!

Mafia Mafioso Consigliere Contractor Soldier Caporegime Forsaken Two Time Joe Doe (sorry)
creator: hatuetq
